zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Molyneux於大約1340年出生在英國藍卡爾奧斯巴爾德斯頓時，她的父親William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton31歲，母親Joan Elall28歲。她於大約1362年與Richard DeBalderston在英國英格蘭藍卡爾奧斯巴爾德斯頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Molyneux于大约1340年出生在英国藍卡爾奧斯巴爾德斯頓时，她的父亲William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton31岁，母亲Joan Elall28岁。她于大约1362年与Richard DeBalderston在英国英格兰藍卡爾奧斯巴爾德斯頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Molyneux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French molineux ‘miller’, a variant of molineur, molinier. See Mulliner .
English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from an unidentified French placename.

variants.name: Mullineaux
meanings: Irish and English (Lancashire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Mulliner
meanings: English: occupational name for a miller, from Old French molinier ‘miller’. Compare Molyneux .

variants.name: Molineaux
meanings: English (Lancashire and Staffordshire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Molyneaux
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Molyneux  . Compare   Mallonee  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Molyneux was born about 1340, in Osbaldeston, Lancashire, England, her father, William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton, was 31 and her mother, Joan Elall, was 28. She married Richard DeBalderston about 1362, in Osbaldeston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Molyneux est née environ 1340, à Osbaldeston, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan Elall, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Richard DeBalderston environ 1362, à Osbaldeston, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Molyneux um 1340 in Osbaldeston, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton 31 und ihre Mutter Joan Elall 28. Sie hat um 1362 in Osbaldeston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Richard DeBalderston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Molyneux è nata il circa 1340 nel Osbaldeston, Lancashire, England, sua padre, William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Joan Elall, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Richard DeBalderston circa 1362, nel Osbaldeston, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Molyneuxが約1340年にイギリスランカシュアイアオスバルデストンで生まれた時，父William Molyneux I, Lord Of Seftonは31歳，母Joan Elallは28歳であった。約1362年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアオスバルデストンでRichard DeBalderstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Molyneux(이)가 대략 1340년 영국 랭카실르 오스볼데스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Elall(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1362년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 오스볼데스턴에서 Richard DeBalderston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Molyneux nasceu aproximadamente 1340, em Osbaldeston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joan Elall, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard DeBalderston aproximadamente 1362, em Osbaldeston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Molyneux родилась около 1340 г. в местности осбалдестон, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Elall, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard DeBalderston около 1362 г. в местности осбалдестон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Molyneux nació aproximadamente 1340, en Osbaldeston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Molyneux I, Lord Of Sefton, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Joan Elall, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Richard DeBalderston aproximadamente 1362, en Osbaldeston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos.
